Why Best Cars

The Best Cars
Standard.

🔍
01
200-Point Inspection

Every vehicle undergoes a rigorous 200-point mechanical, structural and cosmetic inspection by our certified engineers before listing.

📋
02
Clean Title Guarantee

Full documentation audit, RTO transfer assistance, and no-hypothecation clearance on every car. Zero legal surprises.

💳
03
Finance in 4 Hours

Partnerships with 18+ banks and NBFCs. Get loan approval in 4 hours at competitive rates starting at 8.5% p.a.

🛡️
04
1-Year Warranty

All certified vehicles include a 1-year / 20,000 km comprehensive powertrain warranty. Drive with zero anxiety.

🚗
05
Free Test Drive

Visit us and check the performance of the car. Experience it your way, decide at your pace.

♻️
06
Sell or Exchange

Get the best instant valuation for your existing car. Use as a down payment or receive a direct bank transfer.

About Us

Hyderabad's Most
Trusted Pre-Owned
Car Dealership

Best Cars was founded with a simple mission — to make buying and selling used cars honest, transparent, and stress-free. With over 22 years of experience in the automotive market, we have helped thousands of families find their perfect vehicle.

Every car in our inventory is carefully inspected, certified, and priced fairly. We believe in building long-term relationships — not just one-time transactions.

Cars Sold

200-Point Inspection
Every car undergoes a thorough inspection before listing.

Fair & Transparent Pricing

End-to-End Support

Car Finance

Drive Now, Pay Easy

Get flexible financing options tailored to your budget. Low interest rates, quick approval, and zero hidden charges.

Bank Loans

Quick Approval

EMI Options

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about buying and selling at Best Cars.

Every car undergoes a rigorous 200-point inspection by our certified engineers covering mechanical systems, electronics, bodywork, interior, tyres, and safety features. We provide a detailed inspection report with every sale, so you know exactly what you're getting.
Yes! We have partnerships with 18+ banks and NBFCs including SBI, HDFC, ICICI, and Axis Bank. We offer competitive interest rates starting at 8.5% p.a. with flexible tenures from 12 to 84 months. Use our EMI calculator above to estimate your monthly payment.
All certified vehicles come with a 1-year / 20,000 km comprehensive powertrain warranty. This covers the engine, gearbox, and major mechanical components. Extended warranty plans are also available for purchase at an additional cost.
Absolutely! Use our free instant valuation tool to get an estimated market value for your car within minutes. We offer competitive prices and you can either receive a direct bank transfer or use your car's value as a down payment on a new purchase. The entire process is transparent with zero hidden deductions.
In most cases, loan approval takes as little as 2–4 hours with minimal documentation. You'll typically need your PAN card, Aadhaar, 3 months' bank statements, and income proof. Same-day delivery is possible once approval is received.
Absolutely none. The price you see on each car listing is the final price you pay — inclusive of certification, inspection, and basic documentation. Additional costs such as RTO transfer, insurance, and extended warranty are clearly stated upfront before you sign anything.
